extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMAN Pascal won bunch sprint after KWIATKOWSKI crashed at 2km, losing yellow to IMPEY on 4-second bonus
tactical_patterns: Mitchelton-Scott wrested peloton control from Lotto at base of final descent, setting up sprint organization.
Ackerman deliberately positioned rear of leadout train versus front previous day, using slipstream for higher closing speed.
3km rule protected Kwiatkowski's time but bonus seconds loophole cost him yellow jersey to third-place finisher.

rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: negative: crashed exiting roundabout with 2km remaining while in yellow, suggesting positioning error or risk-taking in leadout
rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: positive: opportunistically took third for 4-second bonus, precisely enough to gain yellow, showing tactical awareness
rider_signals.ACKERMAN Pascal: positive: adjusted sprint positioning strategy after previous stage mistake, coming from back with higher speed
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: dropped on food'Avner pass despite moderate difficulty, concerning form signal
rider_signals.KOCHETKOV Pavel: negative: Vital Concept sprinter dropped on Col d'Avner, indicating poor climbing form
